app.name: PhysioDesk
app.tagline: Daily resistance-band care for desk workers — 5 minutes a day.

login.title: Sign in to PhysioDesk
login.subtitle: Enter your work email to receive a sign-in link.
login.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the sign-in link.

bodyMap.title: Where do you feel discomfort?
bodyMap.subtitle: Click any area on the body where you feel pain, tightness, or strain.
bodyMap.durationLabel: How long have you felt this?
bodyMap.durationWeeks: {n, plural, =0 {Less than a week} one {{n} week} other {{n} weeks}}
bodyMap.noSymptoms: I don't have any pain — I want a preventive program

redFlag.title: A few safety questions
redFlag.subtitle: Please answer honestly — these help us know if you need to see a clinician first.

referral.title: Please see a clinician before starting
referral.body: Based on your answers, we recommend you see a doctor or physiotherapist before beginning an exercise program. PhysioDesk is designed for prevention, not for treating symptoms that warrant medical evaluation.

assigned.title: Your program is ready
assigned.subtitle: We've assigned you the {programName} program — 12 weeks, 5 minutes a day.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.streak: {n, plural, =0 {No streak yet} one {{n} day streak} other {{n} day streak}}

admin.title: Wellness dashboard
admin.kAnonNotice: Not enough data yet — at least 5 active members are required to display aggregate outcomes.
